name: The One Who Is the Most Free Is the Pirate King!!!

issues.description: Trigger 'Trigger' is vague. Main effect should use 'OnPlay' (card is played) or 'Activated' (activated ability). Given '[Main]' notation, 'OnPlay' is most appropriate.
Filter is 'Any' but effect specifies 'up to 1 {Supernovas} type Character card'. Filter must include type constraint: {"type":"Supernovas","cardType":"Character"}

SearchDeck action does not capture the 'look at 5 cards' and 'place rest at bottom in any order' mechanics. The DSL is incomplete—it should reflect the library interaction (5-card window, deck ordering).
